name: pylomarket
description: PyloMarket - Prediction Markets Platform with HarperDB and Next.js

scripts.docker:clean: npm run docker:stop && npm run docker:rm
scripts.docker:run: npm run docker:clean && docker run -d --name pylomarket-app -p 9925:9925 -p 9926:9926 --env-file .env -v harperdb_data:/opt/harperdb/hdb --restart unless-stopped pylomarket:latest
scripts.docker:rebuild: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:run
scripts.deploy: npx -y dotenv-cli -- harperdb deploy . restart=rolling replicated=true
